NO1.method: production-based generation-mix (ENTSO-E A75 x IPCC AR5 lifecycle factors)
NO1.source: ENTSO-E Transparency generation-per-type + IPCC AR5 Annex III; derived by Khepri (avalyset/khepri)
NO1.note: Stable year-over-year (<5% drift 2021-2025); annual update sufficient.

NO2.method: production-based generation-mix (ENTSO-E A75 x IPCC AR5 lifecycle factors)
NO2.source: ENTSO-E Transparency generation-per-type + IPCC AR5 Annex III; derived by Khepri (avalyset/khepri)
NO2.note: Stable year-over-year (<5% drift 2021-2025); annual update sufficient.

NO3.method: production-based generation-mix (ENTSO-E A75 x IPCC AR5 lifecycle factors)
NO3.source: ENTSO-E Transparency generation-per-type + IPCC AR5 Annex III; derived by Khepri (avalyset/khepri)
NO3.note: Stable year-over-year (<5% drift 2021-2025); annual update sufficient.

NO4.method: production-based generation-mix (ENTSO-E A75 x IPCC AR5 lifecycle factors)
NO4.source: ENTSO-E Transparency generation-per-type + IPCC AR5 Annex III; derived by Khepri (avalyset/khepri)
NO4.note: Event-driven variability: Hammerfest LNG gas turbines (offline after Sept-2020 fire, restart Jun-2022). Period-dependent, not a stable constant; CI ranged 23-51 gCO2eq/kWh 2021-2024.

NO5.method: production-based generation-mix (ENTSO-E A75 x IPCC AR5 lifecycle factors)
NO5.source: ENTSO-E Transparency generation-per-type + IPCC AR5 Annex III; derived by Khepri (avalyset/khepri)
NO5.note: Production-based CI near the hydro lifecycle floor (~24) in pure-hydropower periods; small residual gas phasing out 2022-2025.

metadata.source: NO1-NO5: ENTSO-E Transparency actual generation per production type, weighted by IPCC AR5 Annex III lifecycle emission factors (production-based generation-mix), derived reproducibly by Khepri (avalyset/khepri). SE1-SE4 and FI: prior values, unchanged.
metadata.method: production-based: weighted average of generation-mix per source x lifecycle factor (same approach as CodeCarbon's static fallback methodology). NOT consumption-based; the Electricity Maps API path remains the consumption-based source.
metadata.notes: NO1-NO5 replace the prior uniform 18.0 placeholder with per-zone derived values. Drift characterization: NO1/NO2/NO3 stable year-over-year (<5%); NO4 event-driven (Hammerfest LNG outage 2020-2022), period-dependent; NO5 near hydro floor. Production-based NO CI is low and not very distinct between zones except where fossil gas occurs (NO4). SE1-SE4 and FI retained from prior data pending equivalent per-zone derivation.
